data.user_prompt: Compare local outpatient mental health providers in Louisville.
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response perplexity Compare local outpatient mental health providers in Louisville.

sections.text:
The top local outpatient mental health providers in Louisville include **LifeStance Health**, **Kentucky Counseling Center**, **Seven Counties Services**, **Baptist Health Louisville**, and **UofL Health**, each offering distinct outpatient levels of care.

### Key Provider Comparison

| Provider | Outpatient Services Offered | Location | Telehealth | Contact |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **LifeStance Health** | Therapy & Psychiatry (In-person & Telehealth) | 100 Executive Park, Suite 103, Louisville, KY 40207 [2] | Yes [2] | 502-313-6880 [2] |
| **Kentucky Counseling Center** | Counseling, Psychiatry, Case Management (In-person & Telehealth) | 1169 Eastern Pkwy #3328, Highlands, Louisville, KY 40217 [3] | Yes [3] | (Site: kentuckycounselingcenter.com) [3] |
| **Seven Counties Services** | Community Mental Health Center services (Jefferson County) | Serves Jefferson County (Louisville) [5] | Likely (as CMHC) [5] | (Site: sevencounties.org) [5] |
| **Baptist Health Louisville** | Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP), Partial Hospitalization | 4000 Kresge Way, Louisville, KY 40207 [1] | No (IOP is day sessions) [1] | 502-896-7105 (24-hr Access) [1] |
| **UofL Health** | Adult Outpatient Services, Therapy, Art Therapy | Louisville, KY [4] | Yes (implied by system) [4] | 502-451-3333 (Peace Hospital for assessment) [4] |
| **The Brook Hospitals** | Intensive Outpatient, Partial Hospitalization | Dupont & KMI locations, Louisville, KY [6] | No (Structured in-person) [6] | (Site: thebrookhospitals.com) [6] |
| **Louisville Behavioral Health Systems** | Medication Management, TMS, Therapy | Louisville, KY [7] | Likely | (Site: louisvillebehavioral.com) [7] |
| **Norton Healthcare** | Outpatient Mental Health Care | Kentucky & Indiana region [8] | Yes (coordinated care) [8] | (Site: nortonhealthcare.com) [8] |

### Detailed Provider Highlights

*   **LifeStance Health** is a full-service clinic offering both in-person and online visits with psychiatrists and therapists, rated 4.9/5 from 506 reviews [2]. It is convenient for those needing flexible scheduling [2].
*   **Kentucky Counseling Center** specializes in individual, group, family, and couples counseling, plus targeted case management (TCM) for social services like housing and transportation [3]. Their Louisville Highlands office is a key local hub [3].
*   **Seven Counties Services** is Kentucky’s leading Community Mental Health Center, serving Jefferson County (Louisville)
